prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to sensitive catchment areas, which are typically subject to regulations managed at the level of the respective nations within the UK. There is no indication from the title that it specifically relates to Scotland, and catchment area guidelines may differ across the UK.
